description:
ll just return the original.

    *   Wait, I'll make one tiny change to make it more "to-the-point".
    *   "You are a mechanical design engineer at a sheet-metal fabrication shop. Fully define the L-bracket sketch in /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/bracket_start.slvs using the dimensional constraints from the specification sheet on the desktop. Save the constrained file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/bracket_constrained.slvs."

    *   This is better. It's more direct.

    *   Wait, the original mentions "where the geometry is complete but lacks the dimensional constraints required for the CNC press-brake". This is good context. I'll put it back.
